hero.subtitle: Software Developer
hero.description: I’m a developer who loves mastering new technologies to build useful digital products. My certifications are my technical foundation, and I use AI as a helpful ally for interface design.

about.title: Building digital solutions with dedication
about.description: What I might lack in traditional workplace experience, I make up for with constant study and a real passion for what I do. I enjoy building digital products that run smoothly, always following the best practices I’ve learned and certified. I adapt quickly to any tool
about.clean-code-description: Writing tidy, maintainable, and scalable code is my priority. I believe a solid structure is key for any project to grow without issues.
about.ai-interfaces-description: I’m not a designer, but I use AI as a helpful tool to generate modern and attractive interfaces, making sure they stay intuitive
about.high-performance-description: I'm big on making programs run fast. I optimize every resource to ensure the software's response is as efficient as possible.
about.fast-delivery-description: I work in an organized, agile way. I focus on taking things step-by-step and delivering working results quickly so I can improve along the way.

projects.title: Main Projects
projects.subtitle: A look at the technical challenges I’ve solved to put my knowledge into practice and keep learning.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Validated courses and training that back up my knowledge and technical skills.

contact.title: Let's build something exceptional together
contact.subtitle: I'm available for freelance projects or joining a team full-time

footer.title: Full-stack developer focused on creating functional digital solutions. I combine a solid certified background with the use of AI to solve problems and design interfaces.

course-section.title: Courses and certifications
course-section.description: A complete record of my professional certifications, validating expertise in development, cloud computing, DevOps, and security.

project-section.title: Projects
project-section.description: A comprehensive collection of projects spanning web development, mobile applications, open-source tools, and enterprise solutions.
